name: Fudge/Diabetic
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Liquid artificial sweetener (equal to 1/2 cup sugar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely crush enough graham crackers to equal the amount called for in the recipe.
2. Combine milk and cocoa powder in a 1 1/2 quart saucepan; beat until well blended.
3. Add margarine, sweetener, and salt. Bring mixture to a boil and remove from heat.
4. Stir in vanilla extract, remaining ingredients except the chopped nuts, and crushed graham crackers. Mix until well combined.
5. Cool about 15 minutes.
6. Divide the mixture into 32 balls.
7. Roll each ball in the remaining crushed graham crackers and chill.
Yield: 32 candies
Exchange: Each candy equals 1/2 bread substitute and 1 fat exchange.
